name: docker-build\n        template: docker-build-push\n        dependencies: [build-binary]\n        when: \"\\\"{{workflow.parameters.tag}}\\\" != \\\"\\\"\"\n      - name: github-release\n        template: create-github-release\n        dependencies: [docker-build]\n        when: \"\\\"{{workflow.parameters.tag}}\\\" != \\\"\\\"\"\n\n  - name: workspace\n        mountPath: /workspace\n\n  - name: cargo-lint\n    container:\n      image: rust:1.87-slim\n      command: [sh, -c]\n      args:\n      - cd /workspace/src && cargo fmt --all -- --check && cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings\n      volumeMounts:\n      - name: workspace\n        mountPath: /workspace\n\n  - name: cargo-test\n    container:\n      image: rust:1.87-slim\n      command: [sh, -c]\n      args:\n      - cd /workspace/src && cargo test --all --all-features 2>&1\n      volumeMounts:\n      - name: workspace\n        mountPath: /workspace\n      resources:\n        requests:\n          cpu: \"2\"\n          memory: \"4Gi\"\n\n  - name: cargo-build\n    container:\n      image: rust:1.87-slim\n      command: [sh, -c]\n      args:\n      - resp.avg_doc_length * resp.total_docs as f64;\n75\t            for (term, stats) in &resp.term_stats {\n76\t                *term_df.entry(term.clone()).or_insert(0) += stats.df;\n77\t            }\n78\t        }\n79\t\n80\t        let avg_doc_length = if total_docs > 0 {\n81\t            total_length / total_docs as f64\n82\t        } else {\n83\t            0.0\n84\t        };\n85\t\n86\t        let n = total_docs as f64;\n87\t        let terms = term_df\n88\t            .into_iter()\n89\t            .map(|(term, df)| {\n90\t                let idf = if df == 0 {\n91\t                    0.0\n92\t                } else {\n93\t                    ((n - df as f64 + 0.5) / (df as f64 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0\n94\t                };\n95\t                (term, GlobalTermStats { df, idf })\n96\t            })\n97\t            .collect();\n98\t\n99\t        Self { total_docs, avg_doc_length, terms }\n100\t    }\n101\t}\n102\t\n103\t// {\n321\t    Timeout,\n322\t    HttpError { status: u16, body: String },\n323\t    NetworkError(String),\n324\t}\n325\t\n326\t#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\n327\tpub struct SearchRequest {\n328\t    pub index_uid: String,\n329\t    pub query: Option<String>,\n330\t    pub offset: usize,\n331\t    pub limit: usize,\n332\t    pub filter: Option<Value>,\n333\t    pub facets: Option<Vec<String>>,\n334\t    pub ranking_score: bool,\n335\t    pub body: Value,\n336\t    /// Global IDF data from the preflight phase (OP#4).\n337\t    pub global_idf: Option<GlobalIdf>,\n338\t}\n339\t\n340\timpl SearchRequest {\n341\t    /// Build the request body for sending to a node.\n342\t    ///\n343\t    /// Injects `showRankingScore: true` unconditionally so the merger can global-sort.\n344\t    /// Each node receives `offset + limit` results to ensure the coordinator has enough\n345\t    /// data to apply pagination.\n346\t    pub fn to_node_body(&self) -> Value {\n347\t        let mut body = self.body.clone();\n348\t\n349\t        // Inject showRankingScore: true unconditionally for global sorting\n350\t        body[\"showRankingScore\"] = serde_json::json!(true);\n351\t\n352\t        // Set limit to offset + limit so we get enough results for pagination\n353\t        // (coordinator applies final offset/limit after merging)\n354\t        body[\"limit\"] = serde_json::json!(self.offset + self.limit);\n355\t\n356\t        // Set offset to 0 on individual nodes (coordinator handles offset)\n357\t        body[\"offset\"] = serde_json::json!(0);\n358\t\n359\t        // Ensure query is set\n360\t        if let Some(q) = &self.query {\n361\t            body[\"q\"] = serde_json::json!(q);\n362\t        }\n363\t\n364\t        // Ensure filter is set if provided\n365\t        if let Some(filter) = &self.filter {\n366\t            body[\"filter\"] = filter.clone();\n367\t        }\n368\t\n369\t        // Ensure facets are set if provided\n370\t        if let Some(facets) = &self.facets {\n371\t            body[\"facets\"] = serde_json::json!(facets);\n372\t        }\n373\t\n374\t        body\n375\t    }\n376\t}\n377\t\n378\t#[derive(Debug)]\n379\tpub struct ScatterResult {\n380\t    pub shard_pages: Vec<ShardHitPage>,\n381\t    pub failed_shards: HashMap<u32, NodeError>,\n382\t    pub partial: bool,\n383\t    pub deadline_exceeded: bool,\n384\t}\n385\t\n386\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(query_seq, rf, shard_count))]\n387\tpub async fn plan_search_scatter(\n388\t    topology: &Topology,\n389\t    query_seq: u64,\n390\t    rf: usize,\n391\t    shard_count: u32,\n392\t    replica_selector: Option<&ReplicaSelector>,\n393\t) -> ScatterPlan {\n394\t    let chosen_group = query_group(query_seq, topology.replica_group_count());\n395\t\n396\t    let group = match topology.group(chosen_group) {\n397\t        Some(g) => g,\n398\t        None => {\n399\t            return ScatterPlan {\n400\t                chosen_group, target_shards: Vec::new(),\n401\t                shard_to_node: HashMap::new(), deadline_ms: 0, hedging_eligible: false,\n402\t            };\n403\t        }\n404\t    };\n405\t\n406\t    let _covering = covering_set(shard_count, group, rf, query_seq);\n407\t\n408\t    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n409\t    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n410\t        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n411\t\n412\t        let selected = if let Some(selector) = replica_selector {\n413\t            match selector.select(&replicas, chosen_group).await {\n414\t                Some(node) => node,\n415\t                None => replicas[(query_seq as usize) % replicas.len()].clone(),\n416\t            }\n417\t        } else {\n418\t            replicas[(query_seq as usize) % replicas.len()].clone()\n419\t        };\n420\t\n421\t        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n422\t    }\n423\t\n424\t    ScatterPlan {\n425\t        chosen_group,\n426\t        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n427\t        shard_to_node,\n428\t        deadline_ms: 5000,\n429\t        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n430\t    }\n431\t}\n432\t\n433\t/// Plan search scatter with settings version floor filtering (plan §13.5).\n434\t///\n435\t/// Excludes nodes whose settings version for the given index is below `floor`.\n436\t/// Returns None if no covering set can be assembled (caller should return 503).\n437\tpub async fn plan_search_scatter_with_version_floor(\n438\t    topology: &Topology,\n439\t    query_seq: u64,\n440\t    rf: usize,\n441\t    shard_count: u32,\n442\t    index: &str,\n443\t    floor: u64,\n444\t    version_checker: &impl Fn(&str, &str) -> u64,\n445\t    replica_selector: Option<&ReplicaSelector>,\n446\t) -> Option<ScatterPlan> {\n447\t    let chosen_group = query_group(query_seq, topology.replica_group_count());\n448\t\n449\t    let group = topology.group(chosen_group)?;\n450\t\n451\t    let covering = covering_set_with_version_floor(\n452\t        shard_count,\n453\t        group,\n454\t        rf,\n455\t        query_seq,\n456\t        index,\n457\t        floor,\n458\t        version_checker,\n459\t    )?;\n460\t\n461\t    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n462\t    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n463\t        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n464\t        // Filter by version floor\n465\t        let eligible: Vec<_> = replicas\n466\t            .iter()\n467\t            .filter(|node_id| {\n468\t                let version = version_checker(index, node_id.as_str());\n469\t                version >= floor\n470\t            })\n471\t            .collect();\n472\t\n473\t        if eligible.is_empty() {\n474\t            return None;\n475\t        }\n476\t\n477\t        let selected = if let Some(selector) = replica_selector {\n478\t            // Convert Vec<&NodeId> to Vec<NodeId> for selector\n479\t            let eligible_owned: Vec<NodeId> = eligible.iter().map(|&n| n.clone()).collect();\n480\t            match selector.select(&eligible_owned, chosen_group).await {\n481\t                Some(node) => node,\n482\t                None => eligible[query_seq as usize % eligible.len()].clone(),\n483\t            }\n484\t        } else {\n485\t            eligible[query_seq as usize % eligible.len()].clone()\n486\t        };\n487\t\n488\t        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected.clone());\n489\t    }\n490\t\n491\t    Some(ScatterPlan {\n492\t        chosen_group,\n493\t        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n494\t        shard_to_node,\n495\t        deadline_ms: 5000,\n496\t        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n497\t    })\n498\t}\n499\t\n500\t/// Plan search scatter for a specific replica group (plan §13.6 session pinning).\n501\t///\n502\t/// Used when a session has a pending write and needs to read from the pinned group\n503\t/// to ensure read-your-writes consistency.\n504\tpub async fn plan_search_scatter_for_group(\n505\t    topology: &Topology,\n506\t    query_seq: u64,\n507\t    rf: usize,\n508\t    shard_count: u32,\n509\t    pinned_group: u32,\n510\t    replica_selector: Option<&ReplicaSelector>,\n511\t) -> Option<ScatterPlan> {\n512\t    let group = topology.group(pinned_group)?;\n513\t\n514\t    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n515\t    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n516\t        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n517\t        if replicas.is_empty() {\n518\t            continue;\n519\t        }\n520\t\n521\t        let selected = if let Some(selector) = replica_selector {\n522\t            match selector.select(&replicas, pinned_group).await {\n523\t                Some(node) => node,\n524\t                None => replicas[query_seq as usize % replicas.len()].clone(),\n525\t            }\n526\t        } else {\n527\t            replicas[query_seq as usize % replicas.len()].clone()\n528\t        };\n529\t\n530\t        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n531\t    }\n532\t\n533\t    Some(ScatterPlan {\n534\t        chosen_group: pinned_group,\n535\t        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n536\t        shard_to_node,\n537\t        deadline_ms: 5000,\n538\t        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n539\t    })\n540\t}\n541\t\n542\t/// Plan search scatter using adaptive replica selection (plan §13.3).\n543\t///\n544\t/// Uses EWMA-based scoring to select the best replica for each shard,\n545\t/// falling back to round-robin for shards with no metrics data.\n546\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(query_seq, rf, shard_count))]\n547\tpub async fn plan_search_scatter_adaptive(\n548\t    topology: &Topology,\n549\t    query_seq: u64,\n550\t    rf: usize,\n551\t    shard_count: u32,\n552\t    replica_selector: &ReplicaSelector,\n553\t) -> ScatterPlan {\n554\t    let chosen_group = query_group(query_seq, topology.replica_group_count());\n555\t\n556\t    let group = match topology.group(chosen_group) {\n557\t        Some(g) => g,\n558\t        None => {\n559\t            return ScatterPlan {\n560\t                chosen_group,\n561\t                target_shards: Vec::new(),\n562\t                shard_to_node: HashMap::new(),\n563\t                deadline_ms: 0,\n564\t                hedging_eligible: false,\n565\t            };\n566\t        }\n567\t    };\n568\t\n569\t    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n570\t    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n571\t        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n572\t        if replicas.is_empty() {\n573\t            continue;\n574\t        }\n575\t\n576\t        // Use adaptive selection to pick the best replica\n577\t        let selected = match replica_selector.select(&replicas, chosen_group).await {\n578\t            Some(node) => node,\n579\t            None => {\n580\t                // Fallback to round-robin if selector returns None\n581\t                replicas[(query_seq as usize) % replicas.len()].clone()\n582\t            }\n583\t        };\n584\t\n585\t        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n586\t    }\n587\t\n588\t    ScatterPlan {\n589\t        chosen_group,\n590\t        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n591\t        shard_to_node,\n592\t        deadline_ms: 5000,\n593\t        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n594\t    }\n595\t}\n596\t\n597\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(node_count))]\n598\tpub async fn execute_scatter<C: NodeClient>(\n599\t    plan: ScatterPlan,\n600\t    client: &C,\n601\t    req: SearchRequest,\n602\t    topology: &Topology,\n603\t    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n604\t) -> Result<ScatterResult> {\n605\t    let mut node_to_shards: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<u32>> = HashMap::new();\n606\t    for (&shard_id, node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {\n607\t        if plan.target_shards.contains(&shard_id) {\n608\t            node_to_shards.entry(node_id.clone()).or_default().push(shard_id);\n609\t        }\n610\t    }\n611\t    tracing::Span::current().record(\"node_count\", node_to_shards.len());\n612\t\n613\t    let mut shard_pages = Vec::new();\n614\t    let mut failed_shards = HashMap::new();\n615\t    let mut deadline_exceeded = false;\n616\t\n617\t    let mut tasks = Vec::new();\n618\t    for (node_id, shards) in node_to_shards {\n619\t        let node = match topology.node(&node_id) {\n620\t            Some(n) => n.clone(),\n621\t            None => {\n622\t                for shard_id in shards {\n623\t                    failed_shards.insert(shard_id, NodeError::NetworkError(\"node not in topology\".to_string()));\n624\t                }\n625\t                continue;\n626\t            }\n627\t        };\n628\t        let client_ref = client;\n629\t        let req_clone = req.clone();\n630\t        let node_id_clone = node_id.clone();\n631\t        let shard_count = shards.len();\n632\t        // Create a span for this node's scatter call\n633\t        let span = info_span!(\n634\t            \"scatter_node\",\n635\t            node_id = %node_id_clone,\n636\t            address = %node.address,\n637\t            shard_count = shard_count,\n638\t        );\n639\t        tasks.push(async move {\n640\t            let result = client_ref.search_node(&node_id_clone, &node.address, &req_clone).await;\n641\t            (node_id_clone, shards, result)\n642\t        }.instrument(span));\n643\t    }\n644\t\n645\t    let results = futures_util::future::join_all(tasks).await;\n646\t\n647\t    for (_node_id, shards, result) in results {\n648\t        match result {\n649\t            Ok(body) => {\n650\t                for _shard_id in shards {\n651\t                    shard_pages.push(ShardHitPage { body: body.clone() });\n652\t                }\n653\t            }\n654\t            Err(NodeError::Timeout) => {\n655\t                deadline_exceeded = true;\n656\t                for shard_id in shards { failed_shards.insert(shard_id, NodeError::Timeout); }\n657\t            }\n658\t            Err(e) => {\n659\t                for shard_id in shards { failed_shards.insert(shard_id, e.clone()); }\n660\t            }\n661\t        }\n662\t    }\n663\t\n664\t    let partial = !failed_shards.is_empty();\n665\t\n666\t    match policy {\n667\t        UnavailableShardPolicy::Error => {\n668\t            if !failed_shards.is_empty() {\n669\t                return Err(crate::error::MiroirError::Routing(format!(\"{} shard(s) unavailable\", failed_shards.len())));\n670\t            }\n671\t        }\n672\t        UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial => {}\n673\t        UnavailableShardPolicy::Fallback => {\n674\t            // Group-unavailability fallback: try other replica groups for failed shards\n675\t            if !failed_shards.is_empty() {\n676\t                let mut fallback_pages = Vec::new();\n677\t                let mut remaining_failed = HashMap::new();\n678\t\n679\t                for (&shard_id, error) in &failed_shards {\n680\t                    let mut fallback_succeeded = false;\n681\t\n682\t                    // Try each other replica group\n683\t                    for group_id in 0..topology.replica_group_count() {\n684\t                        if group_id == plan.chosen_group {\n685\t                            continue; // Skip the already-tried group\n686\t                        }\n687\t\n688\t                        if let Some(group) = topology.group(group_id) {\n689\t                            let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), topology.rf());\n690\t                            if replicas.is_empty() {\n691\t                                continue;\n692\t                            }\n693\t\n694\t                            // Try each replica in the fallback group\n695\t                            for node_id in replicas {\n696\t                                if let Some(node) = topology.node(&node_id) {\n697\t                                    match client.search_node(&node_id, &node.address, &req).await {\n698\t                                        Ok(body) => {\n699\t                                            fallback_pages.push(ShardHitPage { body });\n700\t                                            fallback_succeeded = true;\n701\t                                            break;\n702\t                                        }\n703\t                                        Err(_) => {\n704\t                                            continue; // Try next replica\n705\t                                        }\n706\t                                    }\n707\t                                }\n708\t                            }\n709\t\n710\t                            if fallback_succeeded {\n711\t                                break; // Found a working replica\n712\t                            }\n713\t                        }\n714\t                    }\n715\t\n716\t                    if !fallback_succeeded {\n717\t                        remaining_failed.insert(shard_id, error.clone());\n718\t                    }\n719\t                }\n720\t\n721\t                // Merge fallback results\n722\t                shard_pages.extend(fallback_pages);\n723\t\n724\t                // Update failed_shards with only those that truly failed\n725\t                if remaining_failed.is_empty() {\n726\t                    // All shards succeeded via fallback\n727\t                    return Ok(ScatterResult {\n728\t                        shard_pages,\n729\t                        failed_shards: HashMap::new(),\n730\t                        partial: false,\n731\t                        deadline_exceeded,\n732\t                    });\n733\t                } else {\n734\t                    // Some shards still failed\n735\t                    failed_shards = remaining_failed;\n736\t                }\n737\t            }\n738\t        }\n739\t    }\n740\t\n741\t    Ok(ScatterResult { shard_pages, failed_shards, partial, deadline_exceeded })\n742\t}\n743\t\n744\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %req.index_uid))]\n745\tpub async fn scatter_gather_search<C: NodeClient>(\n746\t    plan: ScatterPlan,\n747\t    client: &C,\n748\t    req: SearchRequest,\n749\t    topology: &Topology,\n750\t    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n751\t    strategy: &dyn MergeStrategy,\n752\t) -> Result<MergedSearchResult> {\n753\t    let scatter_result = execute_scatter(plan, client, req.clone(), topology, policy).await?;\n754\t\n755\t    let mut shard_pages = scatter_result.shard_pages;\n756\t    if scatter_result.partial {\n757\t        for shard_id in scatter_result.failed_shards.keys() {\n758\t            shard_pages.push(ShardHitPage {\n759\t                body: serde_json::json!({\"success\": false, \"message\": format!(\"shard {} unavailable\", shard_id)}),\n760\t            });\n761\t        }\n762\t    }\n763\t\n764\t    // Collect failed shard IDs for the X-Miroir-Degraded header\n765\t    let failed_shards: Vec<u32> = scatter_result.failed_shards.keys().copied().collect();\n766\t\n767\t    let merge_input = MergeInput {\n768\t        shard_hits: shard_pages,\n769\t        offset: req.offset,\n770\t        limit: req.limit,\n771\t        client_requested_score: req.ranking_score,\n772\t        facets: req.facets.clone(),\n773\t        failed_shards,\n774\t    };\n775\t\n776\t    // Span for the merge operation\n777\t    let _span = info_span!(\n778\t        \"merge\",\n779\t        shard_count = merge_input.shard_hits.len(),\n780\t        offset = req.offset,\n781\t        limit = req.limit,\n782\t    ).entered();\n783\t\n784\t    strategy.merge(merge_input)\n785\t}\n786\t\n787\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n788\t// OP#4: Global-IDF preflight execution\n789\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n790\t\n791\t/// Extract unique query terms from a search query string.\n792\tpub fn extract_query_terms(query: &Option<String>) -> Vec<String> {\n793\t    match query {\n794\t        Some(q) if !q.is_empty() => {\n795\t            let mut seen = std::collections::HashSet::new();\n796\t            let mut terms = Vec::new();\n797\t            for term in q.split_whitespace() {\n798\t                let lower = term.to_lowercase();\n799\t                if seen.insert(lower.clone()) { terms.push(lower); }\n800\t            }\n801\t            terms\n802\t        }\n803\t        _ => Vec::new(),\n804\t    }\n805\t}\n806\t\n807\t/// Execute the preflight phase: gather term frequencies from all shards.\n808\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(node_count, term_count = req.terms.len()))]\n809\tpub async fn execute_preflight<C: NodeClient>(\n810\t    plan: &ScatterPlan,\n811\t    client: &C,\n812\t    req: &PreflightRequest,\n813\t    topology: &Topology,\n814\t) -> Result<GlobalIdf> {\n815\t    if req.terms.is_empty() {\n816\t        return Ok(GlobalIdf { total_docs: 0, avg_doc_length: 0.0, terms: HashMap::new() });\n817\t    }\n818\t\n819\t    let mut node_to_shards: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<u32>> = HashMap::new();\n820\t    for (&shard_id, node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {\n821\t        if plan.target_shards.contains(&shard_id) {\n822\t            node_to_shards.entry(node_id.clone()).or_default().push(shard_id);\n823\t        }\n824\t    }\n825\t\n826\t    let mut tasks = Vec::new();\n827\t    for (node_id, _) in node_to_shards {\n828\t        let node = match topology.node(&node_id) {\n829\t            Some(n) => n.clone(),\n830\t            None => continue,\n831\t        };\n832\t        let client_ref = client;\n833\t        let req_clone = req.clone();\n834\t        let nid = node_id.clone();\n835\t        tasks.push(async move { client_ref.preflight_node(&nid, &node.address, &req_clone).await });\n836\t    }\n837\t\n838\t    let results = futures_util::future::join_all(tasks).await;\n839\t    let responses: Vec<PreflightResponse> = results.into_iter().filter_map(|r| r.ok()).collect();\n840\t    Ok(GlobalIdf::from_preflight_responses(&responses))\n841\t}\n842\t\n843\t/// Execute a full dfs_query_then_fetch search (OP#4 global-IDF preflight).\n844\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %req.index_uid))]\n845\tpub async fn dfs_query_then_fetch_search<C: NodeClient>(\n846\t    plan: ScatterPlan,\n847\t    client: &C,\n848\t    req: SearchRequest,\n849\t    topology: &Topology,\n850\t    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n851\t    strategy: &dyn MergeStrategy,\n852\t) -> Result<MergedSearchResult> {\n853\t    let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n854\t        index_uid: req.index_uid.clone(),\n855\t        terms: extract_query_terms(&req.query),\n856\t        filter: req.filter.clone(),\n857\t    };\n858\t    let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, client, &preflight_req, topology).await?;\n859\t    let mut search_req = req;\n860\t    search_req.global_idf = Some(global_idf);\n861\t    scatter_gather_search(plan, client, search_req, topology, policy, strategy).await\n862\t}\n863\t\n864\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n865\t// Mock client\n866\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n867\t\n868\t#[derive(Debug, Clone, Default)]\n869\tpub struct MockNodeClient {\n870\t    pub responses:  }\n897\t\n898\t    async fn write_documents(\n899\t        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &WriteRequest,\n900\t    ) -> std::result::Result<WriteResponse, NodeError> {\n901\t            error_type: None,\n936\t        })\n937\t    }\n938\t\n939\t    async fn fetch_documents(\n940\t        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, request: &FetchDocumentsRequest,\n941\t    ) ->       }\n979\t            Ok(TaskStatusResponse {\n980\t                task_uid,\n981\t                status: \"succeeded\".to_string(),\n982\t                error: None,\n983\t                error_type: None,\n984\t            })\n985\t        }\n986\t    }\n987\t}\n988\t\n989\t#[cfg(test)]\n990\tmod tests {\n991\t    use super::*;\n992\t    use crate::topology::{Node,            topo.add_node(node);\n1001\t        }\n1002\t        topo\n1003\t    }\n1004\t\n1005\t    fn make_req() -> SearchRequest {\n1006\t        SearchRequest {\n1007\t            index_uid: assert!(extract_query_terms(&None).is_empty());\n1115\t    }\n1116\t\n1117\t    #[test]\n1118\t    fn test_global_idf_aggregation() {\n1119\t        let resp = vec![\n1120\t            PreflightResponse { total_docs: 50000, avg_doc_length: 50.0, term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"a\".into(), TermStats { df: 5000 })]) },\n1121\t            PreflightResponse { total_docs: 50000, avg_doc_length: 60.0, term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"a\".into(), TermStats { df: 4500 })]) },\n1122\t        ];\n1123\t        let g = GlobalIdf::from_preflight_responses(&resp);\n1124\t        assert_eq!(g.total_docs, 100000);\n1125\t        assert!((g.avg_doc_length - 55.0).abs() < 0.001);\n1126\t        assert_eq!(g.terms.get(\"a\").unwrap().df, 9500);\n1127\t    }\n1128\t\n1129\t assert!(g.terms.is_empty());\n1134\t    }\n1135\t\n1136\t    #[tokio::test]\n1137\t    async fn test_execute_preflight() {\n1138\t        let topo = make_test_topology();\n1139\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64, None).await;\n1140\t        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1141\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1142\t            total_docs: 30000, avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n1143\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"search\".into(), TermStats { df: 3000 })]),\n1144\t        });\n1145\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1146\t            total_docs: 30000, avg_doc_length: 55.0,\n1147\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"search\".into(), TermStats { df: 2500 })]),\n1148\t        });\n1149\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1150\t            total_docs: 40000, avg_doc_length: 52.0,\n1151\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"search\".into(), TermStats { df: 4000 })]),\n1152\t        });\n1153\t        let req = PreflightRequest { index_uid: \"test\".into(), terms: vec![\"search\".into()], filter: None };\n1154\t        let g = execute_preflight(&plan, &c, &req, &topo).await.unwrap();\n1155\t        assert_eq!(g.total_docs, 100000);\n1156\t        assert_eq!(g.terms.get(\"search\").unwrap().df, 9500);\n1157\t    }\n1158\t\n1159\t    #[tokio::test]\n1160\t    async fn test_dfs_query_then_fetch() {\n1161\t        let topo = make_test_topology();\n1162\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64, None).await;\n1163\t        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1164\t        c.responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), serde_json::json!({\"hits\": [{\"id\": \"a\", \"_rankingScore\": 0.9}], \"estimatedTotalHits\": 1, \"processingTimeMs\": 5}));\n1165\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1166\t            total_docs: 50000, avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n1167\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"test\".into(), TermStats { df: 500 })]),\n1168\t        });\n1169\t        let s = crate::merger::RrfStrategy::default_strategy();\n1170\t        let r = dfs_query_then_fetch_search(plan, &c, make_req(), &topo, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial, &s).await.unwrap();\n1171\t        assert!(!r.degraded);\n1172\t        assert!(!r.hits.is_empty());\n1173\t    }\n1174\t\n1175\t    /// Integration test for dfs_query_then_fetch with severely skewed shard distribution.\n1176\t    ///\n1177\t    /// This test simulates the scenario described in miroir-yio:\n1178\t    /// - Shard 0: Normal (1,000 docs, term df = 100)\n1179\t    /// - Shard 1: 100x normal (100,000 docs, term df = 10,000)\n1180\t    /// - Shard 2: Near-empty (10 docs, term df = 1)\n1181\t    ///\n1182\t    /// Without global IDF preflight, each shard would compute different local IDF values:\n1183\t    /// - Shard 0: IDF ≈ log((1000 - 100 + 0.5) / (100 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n1184\t    /// - Shard 1: IDF ≈ log((100000 - 10000 + 0.5) / (10000 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n1185\t    /// - Shard 2: IDF ≈ log((10 - 1 + 0.5) / (1 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.8\n1186\t    ///\n1187\t    /// With global IDF preflight, all shards use the same IDF:\n1188\t    /// - Global: N = 101,010, df = 10,101\n1189\t    /// - IDF ≈ log((101010 - 10101 + 0.5) / (10101 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n1190\t    ///\n1191\t    /// This ensures scores are comparable across shards, enabling correct score-based merge.\n1192\t    #[tokio::test]\n1193\t    async fn test_dfs_skewed_shards_global_idf_aggregation() {\n1194\t        let mut topo = Topology::new(3, 1, 1);\n1195\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), \"http://node-0:7700\".into(), 0));\n1196\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), \"http://node-1:7700\".into(), 0));\n1197\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), \"http://node-2:7700\".into(), 0));\n1198\t\n1199\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 1, 3, None).await;\n1200\t\n1201\t        // Simulate severely skewed shard distribution\n1202\t        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1203\t\n1204\t        // Shard 0: Normal distribution\n1205\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1206\t            total_docs: 1000,\n1207\t            avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n1208\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n1209\t                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 100 }),\n1210\t                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 80 }),\n1211\t            ]),\n1212\t        });\n1213\t\n1214\t        // Shard 1: 100x normal (severely skewed)\n1215\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1216\t            total_docs: 100_000,\n1217\t            avg_doc_length: 55.0,\n1218\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n1219\t                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 10_000 }),\n1220\t                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 8_000 }),\n1221\t            ]),\n1222\t        });\n1223\t\n1224\t        // Shard 2: Near-empty\n1225\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1226\t            total_docs: 10,\n1227\t            avg_doc_length: 45.0,\n1228\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n1229\t                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 1 }),\n1230\t                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 1 }),\n1231\t            ]),\n1232\t        });\n1233\t\n1234\t        // Execute preflight to get global IDF\n1235\t        let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n1236\t            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n1237\t            terms: vec![\"machine\".into(), \"learning\".into()],\n1238\t            filter: None,\n1239\t        };\n1240\t\n1241\t        let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, &c, &preflight_req, &topo).await.unwrap();\n1242\t\n1243\t        // Verify global aggregation\n1244\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.total_docs, 101_010);\n1245\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.terms.get(\"machine\").unwrap().df, 10_101);\n1246\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.terms.get(\"learning\").unwrap().df, 8_081);\n1247\t\n1248\t        // Verify global IDF is the same for all shards\n1249\t        // Expected IDF for \"machine\": log((101010 - 10101 + 0.5) / (10101 + 0.5)) + 1\n1250\t        let expected_idf_machine: f64 = ((101010.0_f64 - 10101.0 + 0.5) / (10101.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n1251\t        let actual_idf_machine = global_idf.terms.get(\"machine\").unwrap().idf;\n1252\t        assert!((actual_idf_machine - expected_idf_machine).abs() < 0.001);\n1253\t\n1254\t        // Expected IDF for \"learning\": log((101010 - 8081 + 0.5) / (8081 + 0.5)) + 1\n1255\t        let expected_idf_learning: f64 = ((101010.0_f64 - 8081.0 + 0.5) / (8081.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n1256\t        let actual_idf_learning = global_idf.terms.get(\"learning\").unwrap().idf;\n1257\t        assert!((actual_idf_learning - expected_idf_learning).abs() < 0.001);\n1258\t\n1259\t        // Verify that without global IDF, local IDF values would differ significantly\n1260\t        // Shard 0 local IDF for \"machine\": log((1000 - 100 + 0.5) / (100 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 3.19\n1261\t        // Shard 1 local IDF for \"machine\": log((100000 - 10000 + 0.5) / (10000 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 3.20\n1262\t        // Shard 2 local IDF for \"machine\": log((10 - 1 + 0.5) / (1 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.85\n1263\t        let local_idf_shard_0: f64 = ((1000.0_f64 - 100.0 + 0.5) / (100.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n1264\t        let local_idf_shard_2: f64 = ((10.0_f64 - 1.0 + 0.5) / (1.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n1265\t        assert!((local_idf_shard_2 - local_idf_shard_0).abs() > 0.2, \"Local IDF values should differ significantly\");\n1266\t        assert!((local_idf_shard_2 - actual_idf_machine).abs() > 0.3, \"Global IDF should be closer to large-shard local IDF\");\n1267\t    }\n1268\t\n1269\t    /// Test that DFS preflight handles empty query terms gracefully.\n1270\t    #[tokio::test]\n1271\t    async fn test_dfs_empty_query_terms() {\n1272\t        let topo = make_test_topology();\n1273\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64, None).await;\n1274\t        let c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1275\t\n1276\t        let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n1277\t            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n1278\t            terms: vec![],\n1279\t            filter: None,\n1280\t        };\n1281\t\n1282\t        let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, &c, &preflight_req, &topo).await.unwrap();\n1283\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.total_docs, 0);\n1284\t        assert!(global_idf.terms.is_empty());\n1285\t    }\n1286\t\n1287\t    /// Test that DFS preflight handles partial failures gracefully.\n1288\t    #[tokio::test]\n1289\t    async fn test_dfs_partial_failure() {\n1290\t        let mut topo = Topology::new(3, 1, 1);\n1291\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), \"http://node-0:7700\".into(), 0));\n1292\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), \"http://node-1:7700\".into(), 0));\n1293\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), \"http://node-2:7700\".into(), 0));\n1294\t\n1295\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 1, 3, None).await;\n1296\t        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1297\t\n1298\t        // Node 0 returns valid data\n1299\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1300\t            total_docs: 50000,\n1301\t            avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n1302\t c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1307\t            total_docs: 30000,\n1308\t            avg_doc_length: 55.0,\n1309\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"test\".into(), TermStats { df: 3000 })]),\n1310\t        });\n1311\t\n1312\t        // Node 2 fails\n1313\t        c.errors.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), NodeError::Timeout);\n1314\t\n1315\t        let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n1316\t            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n1317\t            terms: vec![\"test\".into()],\n1318\t            filter: None,\n1319\t        };\n1320\t\n1321\t        // Should aggregate from successful nodes only\n1322\t        let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, &c, &preflight_req, &topo).await.unwrap();\n1323\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.total_docs, 80000);\n1324\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.terms.get(\"test\").unwrap().df, 8000);\n1325\t    }\n1326\t\n1327\t    /// Test that to_node_body correctly injects showRankingScore: true and sets limit to offset + limit.\n1328\t    #[test]\n1329\t    fn test_to_node_body_injects_show_ranking_score() {\n1330\t        let req = SearchRequest {\n1331\t            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n1332\t            query: Some(\"rust programming\".into()),\n1333\t            offset: 10,\n1334\t            limit: 20,\n1335\t            filter: Some(serde_json::json!(\"status = published\")),\n1336\t            facets: Some(vec![\"category\".into(), \"tags\".into()]),\n1337\t            ranking_score: false, // Client didn't request scores\n1338\t            body: serde_json::json!({\"custom\": \"field\"}),\n1339\t            global_idf: None,\n1340\t        };\n1341\t\n1342\t        let body = req.to_node_body();\n1343\t\n1344\t        // showRankingScore must be true unconditionally\n1345\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"showRankingScore\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(true)));\n1346\t\n1347\t        // limit must be offset + limit (coordinator pagination)\n1348\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"limit\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(30)));\n1349\t\n1350\t        // offset must be 0 (coordinator handles offset)\n1351\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"offset\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(0)));\n1352\t\n1353\t        // query must be set\n1354\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"q\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(\"rust programming\")));\n1355\t\n1356\t        // filter must be set\n1357\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"filter\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(\"status = published\")));\n1358\t\n1359\t        // facets must be set\n1360\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"facets\"), Some(&serde_json::json!([\"category\", \"tags\"])));\n1361\t\n1362\t        // custom body field must be preserved\n1363\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"custom\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(\"field\")));\n1364\t    }\n1365\t\n1366\t    /// Test that to_node_body works with minimal request.\n1367\t    #[test]\n1368\t    fn test_to_node_body_minimal_request() {\n1369\t        let req = SearchRequest {\n1370\t            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n1371\t            query: None,\n1372\t            offset: 0,\n1373\t            limit: 10,\n1374\t            filter: None,\n1375\t            facets: None,\n1376\t            ranking_score: true, // Client requested scores\n1377\t            body: serde_json::json!({}),\n1378\t            global_idf: None,\n1379\t        };\n1380\t\n1381\t        let body = req.to_node_body();\n1382\t\n1383\t        // showRankingScore must be true unconditionally\n1384\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"showRankingScore\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(true)));\n1385\t\n1386\t        // limit must be offset + limit = 10\n1387\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"limit\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(10)));\n1388\t\n1389\t        // offset must be 0\n1390\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"offset\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(0)));\n1391\t    }\n1392\t\n1393\t    /// Test that to_node_body handles large offset/limit correctly.\n1394\t    #[test]\n1395\t    fn test_to_node_body_pagination() {\n1396\t        let req = SearchRequest {\n1397\t            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n1398\t            query: Some(\"test\".into()),\n1399\t            offset: 100,\n1400\t            limit: 50,\n1401\t            filter: None,\n1402\t            facets: None,\n1403\t            ranking_score: false,\n1404\t            body: serde_json::json!({}),\n1405\t            global_idf: None,\n1406\t        };\n1407\t\n1408\t        let body = req.to_node_body();\n1409\t\n1410\t        // limit must be offset + limit = 150 (fetch enough for coordinator pagination)\n1411\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"limit\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(150)));\n1412\t\n1413\t        // offset must be 0 (coordinator handles offset)\n1414\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"offset\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(0)));\n1415\t    }\n1416\t\n1417\t    /// Test group fallback when primary group has failed nodes.\n1418\t    #[tokio::test]\n1419\t    async fn Scatter orchestration: fan-out logic and covering set builder.\n\nuse crate::config::UnavailableShardPolicy;\nuse crate::replica_selection::ReplicaSelector;\nuse tracing::{instrument, info_span, for a search query.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\npub struct ScatterPlan {\n    pub chosen_group: u32,\n    pub target_shards: Vec<u32>,\n    pub shard_to_node: HashMap<u32, NodeId>,\n    pub deadline_ms: u32,\n    pub hedging_eligible: bool,\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// §15 OP#4: Global-IDF preflight (dfs_query_then_fetch pattern)\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/// Per-term document frequency from a single shard.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct TermStats {\n    pub df: u64,\n}\n\n/// Preflight request: gather term-frequency statistics from a shard.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct PreflightRequest {\n    pub index_uid: String,\n    pub terms: Vec<String>,\n    pub filter: Option<Value>,\n}\n\n/// Response from a shard's preflight query.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct PreflightResponse {\n    pub total_docs: u64,\n    pub avg_doc_length: f64,\n    pub term_stats: HashMap<String, TermStats>,\n}\n\n/// Aggregated global term statistics after coordinator aggregation.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct GlobalTermStats {\n    pub df: u64,\n    pub idf: f64,\n}\n\n/// Aggregated global IDF data computed at the coordinator.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct GlobalIdf {\n    pub total_docs: u64,\n    pub avg_doc_length: f64,\n    pub terms: HashMap<String, GlobalTermStats>,\n}\n\nimpl GlobalIdf {\n    /// Aggregate per-shard preflight responses into global IDF.\n    pub fn from_preflight_responses(responses: &[PreflightResponse]) -> Self {\n        let mut total_docs = 0u64;\n        let mut total_length = 0.0f64;\n        let mut term_df: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n\n        for resp in responses {\n            total_docs += resp.total_docs;\n            total_length += resp.avg_doc_length * resp.total_docs as f64;\n            for (term, stats) in &resp.term_stats {\n                *term_df.entry(term.clone()).or_insert(0) += stats.df;\n            }\n        }\n\n        let avg_doc_length = if total_docs > 0 {\n            total_length / total_docs as f64\n        } else {\n            0.0\n        };\n\n        let n = total_docs as f64;\n        let terms = term_df\n            .into_iter()\n            .map(|(term, df)| {\n                let idf = if df == 0 {\n                    0.0\n                } else {\n                    ((n - df as f64 + 0.5) / (df as f64 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0\n                };\n                (term, GlobalTermStats { df, idf })\n            })\n            .collect();\n\n        Self { total_docs, avg_doc_length, terms }\n    }\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// NodeClient trait\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Write path: document operations (P2.2)\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/// Request to add/replace documents on a node.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct WriteRequest {\n    pub index_uid: String,\n    pub documents: Vec<Value>,\n    pub primary_key: Option<String>,\n    /// Internal origin tag for CDC event suppression (plan §13.13).\n    /// - None = client write (always emitted to CDC)\n    /// - Some(\"antientropy\") = anti-entropy repair write (suppressed unless emit_internal_writes)\n    /// - Some(\"reshard_backfill\") = reshard backfill \"type\")]\n    pub error_type: Option<String>,\n}\n\nimpl TaskStatusResponse {\n    /// Convert Meilisearch status string to NodeTaskStatus.\n    pub fn to_node_status(&self) -> crate::task::NodeTaskStatus {\n        match self.status.as_str() {\n            \"enqueued\" => crate::task::NodeTaskStatus::Enqueued,\n            \"processing\" => crate::task::NodeTaskStatus::Processing,\n            \"succeeded\" => crate::task::NodeTaskStatus::Succeeded,\n            \"failed\" => crate::task::NodeTaskStatus::Failed,\n            _ => crate::task::NodeTaskStatus::Enqueued,\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// NodeClient trait\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/// HTTP client for communicating with a Meilisearch node.\n#[allow(async_fn_in_trait)]\npub trait NodeClient: Send + NetworkError(String),\n}\n\n#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\npub struct SearchRequest {\n    pub index_uid: String,\n    pub query: Option<String>,\n    pub offset: usize,\n    pub limit: usize,\n    pub filter: Option<Value>,\n    pub facets: Option<Vec<String>>,\n    pub ranking_score: bool,\n    pub body: Value,\n    /// Global IDF data from the preflight phase (OP#4).\n    pub global_idf: Option<GlobalIdf>,\n}\n\nimpl SearchRequest {\n    /// Build the request body for sending to a node.\n    ///\n    /// Injects `showRankingScore: true` unconditionally so the merger can global-sort.\n    /// Each node receives `offset + limit` results to ensure the coordinator has enough\n    /// data to apply pagination.\n    pub fn to_node_body(&self) -> Value {\n        let mut body = self.body.clone();\n\n        // Inject showRankingScore: true unconditionally for global sorting\n        body[\"showRankingScore\"] = serde_json::json!(true);\n\n        // Set limit to offset + limit so we get enough results for pagination\n        // (coordinator applies final offset/limit after merging)\n        body[\"limit\"] = serde_json::json!(self.offset + self.limit);\n\n        // Set offset to 0 on individual nodes (coordinator handles offset)\n        body[\"offset\"] = serde_json::json!(0);\n\n        // Ensure query is set\n        if let Some(q) = &self.query {\n            body[\"q\"] = serde_json::json!(q);\n        }\n\n        // Ensure filter is set if provided\n        if let Some(filter) = &self.filter {\n            body[\"filter\"] = filter.clone();\n        }\n\n        // Ensure facets are set if provided\n        if let Some(facets) = &self.facets {\n            body[\"facets\"] = serde_json::json!(facets);\n        }\n\n        body\n    }\n}\n\n#[derive(Debug)]\npub struct ScatterResult {\n    pub shard_pages: Vec<ShardHitPage>,\n    pub failed_shards: HashMap<u32, NodeError>,\n    pub partial: bool,\n    pub deadline_exceeded: bool,\n}\n\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(query_seq, rf, shard_count))]\npub async fn plan_search_scatter(\n    topology: &Topology,\n    query_seq: u64,\n    rf: usize,\n    shard_count: u32,\n    replica_selector: Option<&ReplicaSelector>,\n) -> ScatterPlan {\n    let chosen_group = query_group(query_seq, topology.replica_group_count());\n\n    let group = match topology.group(chosen_group) {\n        Some(g) => g,\n        None => {\n            return ScatterPlan {\n                chosen_group, target_shards: Vec::new(),\n                shard_to_node: HashMap::new(), deadline_ms: 0, hedging_eligible: false,\n            };\n        }\n    };\n\n    let _covering = covering_set(shard_count, group, rf, query_seq);\n\n    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n\n        let selected = if let Some(selector) = replica_selector {\n            match selector.select(&replicas, chosen_group).await {\n                Some(node) => node,\n                None => replicas[(query_seq as usize) % replicas.len()].clone(),\n            }\n        } else {\n            replicas[(query_seq as usize) % replicas.len()].clone()\n        };\n\n        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n    }\n\n    ScatterPlan {\n        chosen_group,\n        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n        shard_to_node,\n        deadline_ms: 5000,\n        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n    }\n}\n\n/// Plan search scatter with settings version floor filtering (plan §13.5).\n///\n/// Excludes nodes whose settings version for the given index is below `floor`.\n/// Returns None if no covering set can be assembled (caller should return 503).\npub async fn plan_search_scatter_with_version_floor(\n    topology: &Topology,\n    query_seq: u64,\n    rf: usize,\n    shard_count: u32,\n    index: &str,\n    floor: u64,\n    version_checker: &impl Fn(&str, &str) -> u64,\n    replica_selector: Option<&ReplicaSelector>,\n) -> Option<ScatterPlan> {\n    let chosen_group = query_group(query_seq, topology.replica_group_count());\n\n    let group = topology.group(chosen_group)?;\n\n    let covering = covering_set_with_version_floor(\n        shard_count,\n        group,\n        rf,\n        query_seq,\n        index,\n        floor,\n        version_checker,\n    )?;\n\n    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n        // Filter by version floor\n        let eligible: Vec<_> = replicas\n            .iter()\n            .filter(|node_id| {\n                let version = version_checker(index, node_id.as_str());\n                version >= floor\n            })\n            .collect();\n\n        if eligible.is_empty() {\n            return None;\n        }\n\n        let selected = if let Some(selector) = replica_selector {\n            // Convert Vec<&NodeId> to Vec<NodeId> for selector\n            let eligible_owned: Vec<NodeId> = eligible.iter().map(|&n| n.clone()).collect();\n            match selector.select(&eligible_owned, chosen_group).await {\n                Some(node) => node,\n                None => eligible[query_seq as usize % eligible.len()].clone(),\n            }\n        } else {\n            eligible[query_seq as usize % eligible.len()].clone()\n        };\n\n        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected.clone());\n    }\n\n    Some(ScatterPlan {\n        chosen_group,\n        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n        shard_to_node,\n        deadline_ms: 5000,\n        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n    })\n}\n\n/// Plan search scatter for a specific replica group (plan §13.6 session pinning).\n///\n/// Used when a session has a pending write and needs to read from the pinned group\n/// to ensure read-your-writes consistency.\npub async fn plan_search_scatter_for_group(\n    topology: &Topology,\n    query_seq: u64,\n    rf: usize,\n    shard_count: u32,\n    pinned_group: u32,\n    replica_selector: Option<&ReplicaSelector>,\n) -> Option<ScatterPlan> {\n    let group = topology.group(pinned_group)?;\n\n    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n        if replicas.is_empty() {\n            continue;\n        }\n\n        let selected = if let Some(selector) = replica_selector {\n            match selector.select(&replicas, pinned_group).await {\n                Some(node) => node,\n                None => replicas[query_seq as usize % replicas.len()].clone(),\n            }\n        } else {\n            replicas[query_seq as usize % replicas.len()].clone()\n        };\n\n        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n    }\n\n    Some(ScatterPlan {\n        chosen_group: pinned_group,\n        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n        shard_to_node,\n        deadline_ms: 5000,\n        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n    })\n}\n\n/// Plan search scatter using adaptive replica selection (plan §13.3).\n///\n/// Uses EWMA-based scoring to select the best replica for each shard,\n/// falling back to round-robin for shards with no metrics data.\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(query_seq, rf, shard_count))]\npub async fn plan_search_scatter_adaptive(\n    topology: &Topology,\n    query_seq: u64,\n    rf: usize,\n    shard_count: u32,\n    replica_selector: &ReplicaSelector,\n) -> ScatterPlan {\n    let chosen_group = query_group(query_seq, topology.replica_group_count());\n\n    let group = match topology.group(chosen_group) {\n        Some(g) => g,\n        None => {\n            return ScatterPlan {\n                chosen_group,\n                target_shards: Vec::new(),\n                shard_to_node: HashMap::new(),\n                deadline_ms: 0,\n                hedging_eligible: false,\n            };\n        }\n    };\n\n    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n        if replicas.is_empty() {\n            continue;\n        }\n\n        // Use adaptive selection to pick the best replica\n        let selected = match replica_selector.select(&replicas, chosen_group).await {\n            Some(node) => node,\n            None => {\n                // Fallback to round-robin if selector returns None\n                replicas[(query_seq as usize) % replicas.len()].clone()\n            }\n        };\n\n        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n    }\n\n    ScatterPlan {\n        chosen_group,\n        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n        shard_to_node,\n        deadline_ms: 5000,\n        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n    }\n}\n\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(node_count))]\npub async fn execute_scatter<C: NodeClient>(\n    plan: ScatterPlan,\n    client: &C,\n    req: SearchRequest,\n    topology: &Topology,\n    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n) -> Result<ScatterResult> {\n    let mut node_to_shards: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<u32>> = HashMap::new();\n    for (&shard_id, node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {\n        if plan.target_shards.contains(&shard_id) {\n            node_to_shards.entry(node_id.clone()).or_default().push(shard_id);\n        }\n    }\n    tracing::Span::current().record(\"node_count\", node_to_shards.len());\n\n    let mut shard_pages = Vec::new();\n    let mut failed_shards = HashMap::new();\n    let mut deadline_exceeded = false;\n\n    let mut tasks = Vec::new();\n    for (node_id, shards) in node_to_shards {\n        let node = match topology.node(&node_id) {\n            Some(n) => n.clone(),\n            None => {\n                for shard_id in shards {\n                    failed_shards.insert(shard_id, NodeError::NetworkError(\"node not in topology\".to_string()));\n                }\n                continue;\n            }\n        };\n        let client_ref = client;\n        let req_clone = req.clone();\n        let node_id_clone = node_id.clone();\n        let shard_count = shards.len();\n        // Create a span for this node's scatter call\n        let span = info_span!(\n            \"scatter_node\",\n            node_id = %node_id_clone,\n            address = %node.address,\n            shard_count = shard_count,\n        );\n        tasks.push(async move {\n            let result = client_ref.search_node(&node_id_clone, &node.address, &req_clone).await;\n            (node_id_clone, shards, result)\n        }.instrument(span));\n    }\n\n    let results = futures_util::future::join_all(tasks).await;\n\n    for (_node_id, shards, result) in results {\n        match result {\n            Ok(body) => {\n                for _shard_id in shards {\n                    shard_pages.push(ShardHitPage { body: body.clone() });\n                }\n            }\n            Err(NodeError::Timeout) => {\n                deadline_exceeded = true;\n                for shard_id in shards { failed_shards.insert(shard_id, NodeError::Timeout); }\n            }\n            Err(e) => {\n                for shard_id in shards { failed_shards.insert(shard_id, e.clone()); }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    let partial = !failed_shards.is_empty();\n\n    match policy {\n        UnavailableShardPolicy::Error => {\n            if !failed_shards.is_empty() {\n                return Err(crate::error::MiroirError::Routing(format!(\"{} shard(s) unavailable\", failed_shards.len())));\n            }\n        }\n        UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial => {}\n        UnavailableShardPolicy::Fallback => {\n            // Group-unavailability fallback: try other replica groups for failed shards\n            if !failed_shards.is_empty() {\n                let mut fallback_pages = Vec::new();\n                let mut remaining_failed = HashMap::new();\n\n                for (&shard_id, error) in &failed_shards {\n                    let mut fallback_succeeded = false;\n\n                    // Try each other replica group\n                    for group_id in 0..topology.replica_group_count() {\n                        if group_id == plan.chosen_group {\n                            continue; // Skip the already-tried group\n                        }\n\n                        if let Some(group) = topology.group(group_id) {\n                            let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), topology.rf());\n                            if replicas.is_empty() {\n                                continue;\n                            }\n\n                            // Try each replica in the fallback group\n                            for node_id in replicas {\n                                if let Some(node) = topology.node(&node_id) {\n                                    match client.search_node(&node_id, &node.address, &req).await {\n                                        Ok(body) => {\n                                            fallback_pages.push(ShardHitPage { body });\n                                            fallback_succeeded = true;\n                                            break;\n                                        }\n                                        Err(_) => {\n                                            continue; // Try next replica\n                                        }\n                                    }\n                                }\n                            }\n\n                            if fallback_succeeded {\n                                break; // Found a working replica\n                            }\n                        }\n                    }\n\n                    if !fallback_succeeded {\n                        remaining_failed.insert(shard_id, error.clone());\n                    }\n                }\n\n                // Merge fallback results\n                shard_pages.extend(fallback_pages);\n\n                // Update failed_shards with only those that truly failed\n                if remaining_failed.is_empty() {\n                    // All shards succeeded via fallback\n                    return Ok(ScatterResult {\n                        shard_pages,\n                        failed_shards: HashMap::new(),\n                        partial: false,\n                        deadline_exceeded,\n                    });\n                } else {\n                    // Some shards still failed\n                    failed_shards = remaining_failed;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(ScatterResult { shard_pages, failed_shards, partial, deadline_exceeded })\n}\n\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %req.index_uid))]\npub async fn scatter_gather_search<C: NodeClient>(\n    plan: ScatterPlan,\n    client: &C,\n    req: SearchRequest,\n    topology: &Topology,\n    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n    strategy: &dyn MergeStrategy,\n) -> Result<MergedSearchResult> {\n    let scatter_result = execute_scatter(plan, client, req.clone(), topology, policy).await?;\n\n    let mut shard_pages = scatter_result.shard_pages;\n    if scatter_result.partial {\n        for shard_id in scatter_result.failed_shards.keys() {\n            shard_pages.push(ShardHitPage {\n                body: serde_json::json!({\"success\": false, \"message\": format!(\"shard {} unavailable\", shard_id)}),\n            });\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Collect failed shard IDs for the X-Miroir-Degraded header\n    let failed_shards: Vec<u32> = scatter_result.failed_shards.keys().copied().collect();\n\n    let merge_input = MergeInput {\n        shard_hits: shard_pages,\n        offset: req.offset,\n        limit: req.limit,\n        client_requested_score: req.ranking_score,\n        facets: req.facets.clone(),\n        failed_shards,\n    };\n\n    // Span for the merge operation\n    let _span = info_span!(\n        \"merge\",\n        shard_count = merge_input.shard_hits.len(),\n        offset = req.offset,\n        limit = req.limit,\n    ).entered();\n\n    strategy.merge(merge_input)\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// OP#4: Global-IDF preflight execution\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/// Extract unique query terms from a search query string.\npub fn extract_query_terms(query: &Option<String>) -> Vec<String> {\n    match query {\n        Some(q) if !q.is_empty() => {\n            let mut seen = std::collections::HashSet::new();\n            let mut terms = Vec::new();\n            for term in q.split_whitespace() {\n                let lower = term.to_lowercase();\n                if seen.insert(lower.clone()) { terms.push(lower); }\n            }\n            terms\n        }\n        _ => Vec::new(),\n    }\n}\n\n/// Execute the preflight phase: gather term frequencies from all shards.\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(node_count, term_count = req.terms.len()))]\npub async fn execute_preflight<C: NodeClient>(\n    plan: &ScatterPlan,\n    client: &C,\n    req: &PreflightRequest,\n    topology: &Topology,\n) -> Result<GlobalIdf> {\n    if req.terms.is_empty() {\n        return Ok(GlobalIdf { total_docs: 0, avg_doc_length: 0.0, terms: HashMap::new() });\n    }\n\n    let mut node_to_shards: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<u32>> = HashMap::new();\n    for (&shard_id, node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {\n        if plan.target_shards.contains(&shard_id) {\n            node_to_shards.entry(node_id.clone()).or_default().push(shard_id);\n        }\n    }\n\n    let mut tasks = Vec::new();\n    for (node_id, _) in node_to_shards {\n        let node = match topology.node(&node_id) {\n            Some(n) => n.clone(),\n            None => continue,\n        };\n        let client_ref = client;\n        let req_clone = req.clone();\n        let nid = node_id.clone();\n        tasks.push(async move { client_ref.preflight_node(&nid, &node.address, &req_clone).await });\n    }\n\n    let results = futures_util::future::join_all(tasks).await;\n    let responses: Vec<PreflightResponse> = results.into_iter().filter_map(|r| r.ok()).collect();\n    Ok(GlobalIdf::from_preflight_responses(&responses))\n}\n\n/// Execute a full dfs_query_then_fetch search (OP#4 global-IDF preflight).\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %req.index_uid))]\npub async fn dfs_query_then_fetch_search<C: NodeClient>(\n    plan: ScatterPlan,\n    client: &C,\n    req: SearchRequest,\n    topology: &Topology,\n    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n    strategy: &dyn MergeStrategy,\n) -> Result<MergedSearchResult> {\n    let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n        index_uid: req.index_uid.clone(),\n        terms: extract_query_terms(&req.query),\n        filter: req.filter.clone(),\n    };\n    let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, client, &preflight_req, topology).await?;\n    let mut search_req = req;\n    search_req.global_idf = Some(global_idf);\n    scatter_gather_search(plan, client, search_req, topology, policy, strategy).await\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Mock client\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Default)]\npub struct MockNodeClient {\n    pub responses: HashMap<NodeId, Value>,\n    pub preflight_responses: HashMap<NodeId, PreflightResponse>,\n    pub write_responses: HashMap<NodeId, WriteResponse>,\n    pub fetch_responses: HashMap<NodeId, FetchDocumentsResponse>,\n    pub errors: HashMap<NodeId, NodeError>,\n    pub delay_ms: u64,\n}\n\nimpl NodeClient for MockNodeClient {\n    async fn search_node(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &SearchRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<Value, NodeError> {\n        let _ = self.delay_ms;\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        Ok(self.responses.get(node).cloned().unwrap_or_else(|| {\n            serde_json::json!({\"hits\": [], \"estimatedTotalHits\": 0, \"processingTimeMs\": 0, \"facetDistribution\": {}})\n        }))\n    }\n\n    async fn preflight_node(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &PreflightRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<PreflightResponse, NodeError> {\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        Ok(self.preflight_responses.get(node).cloned().unwrap_or_else(|| {\n            PreflightResponse { total_docs: 1000, avg_doc_length: 50.0, term_stats: HashMap::new() }\n        }))\n    }\n\n    async fn write_documents(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &WriteRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<WriteResponse, NodeError> {\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        Ok(self.write_responses.get(node).cloned().unwrap_or_else(|| {\n            WriteResponse {\n                success: true,\n                task_uid: Some(1),\n                message: None,\n                code: None,\n                error_type: None,\n            }\n        }))\n    }\n\n    async fn delete_documents(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &DeleteByIdsRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<DeleteResponse, NodeError> {\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        Ok(DeleteResponse {\n            success: true,\n            task_uid: Some(1),\n            message: None,\n            code: None,\n            error_type: None,\n        })\n    }\n\n    async fn delete_documents_by_filter(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &DeleteByFilterRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<DeleteResponse, NodeError> {\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        Ok(DeleteResponse {\n            success: true,\n            task_uid: Some(1),\n            message: None,\n            code: None,\n            error_type: None,\n        })\n    }\n\n    async fn fetch_documents(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, request: &FetchDocumentsRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<FetchDocumentsResponse, NodeError> {\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        // Return stored fetch response if available, otherwise return empty\n        let stored = self.fetch_responses.get(node).cloned().unwrap_or_else(|| {\n            FetchDocumentsResponse {\n                results: Vec::new(),\n                limit: request.limit,\n                offset: request.offset,\n                total: 0,\n            }\n        });\n\n        // Handle pagination: if offset exceeds total, return empty results\n        if request.offset as u64 >= stored.total {\n            return Ok(FetchDocumentsResponse {\n                results: Vec::new(),\n                limit: request.limit,\n                offset: request.offset,\n                total: stored.total,\n            });\n        }\n\n        Ok(stored)\n    }\n\n    fn get_task_status(\n        &self,\n        node: &NodeId,\n        _address: &str,\n        _request: &TaskStatusRequest,\n    ) -> impl std::future::Future<Output = std::result::Result<TaskStatusResponse, NodeError>> + Send {\n        let node = node.clone();\n        let task_uid = _request.task_uid;\n        let error = self.errors.get(&node).cloned();\n        async move {\n            if let Some(err) = error {\n                return Err(err);\n            }\n            Ok(TaskStatusResponse {\n                task_uid,\n                status: \"succeeded\".to_string(),\n                error: None,\n                error_type: None,\n            })\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n#[cfg(test)]\nmod tests {\n    use super::*;\n    use crate::topology::{Node, NodeId};\n\n    fn make_test_topology() -> Topology {\n        let mut topo = Topology::new(64, 2, 2);\n        for i in 0u32..6 {\n            let rg = if i < 3 { 0 } else { 1 };\n            let mut node = Node::new(NodeId::new(format!(\"node-{i}\")), format!(\"http://node-{i}:7700\"), rg);\n            node.status = crate::topology::NodeStatus::Active;\n            topo.add_node(node);\n        }\n        topo\n    }\n\n    fn make_req() -> SearchRequest {\n        SearchRequest {\n            index_uid: \"test\".into(), query: Some(\"test\".into()),\n            offset: 0, limit: 10, filter: None, facets: None,\n            ranking_score: false, body: serde_json::json!({}), global_idf: None,\n        }\n    }\n\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_plan_pure_function() {\n        let topo = make_test_topology();\n  }\n\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_plan_group_rotation() {\n        let topo = make_test_topology();\n        assert_eq!(plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64, None).await.chosen_group, 0);\n #[test]\n    fn test_extract_query_terms() {\n        assert_eq!(extract_query_terms(&Some(\"hello world hello\".into())), vec![\"hello\", \"world\"]);\n        assert!(extract_query_terms(&None).is_empty());\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_global_idf_aggregation() {\n        let resp = vec![\n            PreflightResponse { total_docs: 50000, avg_doc_length: 50.0, term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"a\".into(), TermStats { df: 5000 })]) },\n            PreflightResponse { total_docs: 50000, avg_doc_length: 60.0, term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"a\".into(), TermStats { df: 4500 })]) },\n        ];\n        let g = GlobalIdf::from_preflight_responses(&resp);\n        assert_eq!(g.total_docs, 100000);\n        assert!((g.avg_doc_length - 55.0).abs() < 0.001);\n        assert_eq!(g.terms.get(\"a\").unwrap().df, 9500);\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_global_idf_empty() {\n        let g = GlobalIdf::from_preflight_responses(&[]);\n        assert_eq!(g.total_docs, 0);\n        assert!(g.terms.is_empty());\n    }\n\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_execute_preflight() {\n        let topo = make_test_topology();\n        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64, None).await;\n        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n            total_docs: 30000, avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"search\".into(), TermStats { df: 3000 })]),\n        });\n        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n            total_docs: 30000, avg_doc_length: 55.0,\n            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"search\".into(), TermStats { df: 2500 })]),\n        });\n        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n            total_docs: 40000, avg_doc_length: 52.0,\n            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"search\".into(), TermStats { df: 4000 })]),\n        });\n        let req = PreflightRequest { index_uid: \"test\".into(), terms: vec![\"search\".into()], filter: None };\n        let g = execute_preflight(&plan, &c, &req, &topo).await.unwrap();\n        assert_eq!(g.total_docs, 100000);\n        assert_eq!(g.terms.get(\"search\").unwrap().df, 9500);\n    }\n\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_dfs_query_then_fetch() {\n        let topo = make_test_topology();\n        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64, None).await;\n        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n        c.responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), serde_json::json!({\"hits\": [{\"id\": \"a\", \"_rankingScore\": 0.9}], \"estimatedTotalHits\": 1, \"processingTimeMs\": 5}));\n        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n            total_docs: 50000, avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"test\".into(), TermStats { df: 500 })]),\n        });\n        let s = crate::merger::RrfStrategy::default_strategy();\n        let r = dfs_query_then_fetch_search(plan, &c, make_req(), &topo, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial, &s).await.unwrap();\n        assert!(!r.degraded);\n        assert!(!r.hits.is_empty());\n    }\n\n    /// Integration test for dfs_query_then_fetch with severely skewed shard distribution.\n    ///\n    /// This test simulates the scenario described in miroir-yio:\n    /// - Shard 0: Normal (1,000 docs, term df = 100)\n    /// - Shard 1: 100x normal (100,000 docs, term df = 10,000)\n    /// - Shard 2: Near-empty (10 docs, term df = 1)\n    ///\n    /// Without global IDF preflight, each shard would compute different local IDF values:\n    /// - Shard 0: IDF ≈ log((1000 - 100 + 0.5) / (100 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n    /// - Shard 1: IDF ≈ log((100000 - 10000 + 0.5) / (10000 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n    /// - Shard 2: IDF ≈ log((10 - 1 + 0.5) / (1 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.8\n    ///\n    /// With global IDF preflight, all shards use the same IDF:\n    /// - Global: N = 101,010, df = 10,101\n    /// - IDF ≈ log((101010 - 10101 + 0.5) / (10101 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n    ///\n    /// This ensures scores are comparable across shards, enabling correct score-based merge.\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_dfs_skewed_shards_global_idf_aggregation() {\n        let mut topo = Topology::new(3, 1, 1);\n        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), \"http://node-0:7700\".into(), 0));\n        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), \"http://node-1:7700\".into(), 0));\n        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), \"http://node-2:7700\".into(), 0));\n\n        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 1, 3, None).await;\n\n        // Simulate severely skewed shard distribution\n        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n\n        // Shard 0: Normal distribution\n        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n            total_docs: 1000,\n            avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 100 }),\n                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 80 }),\n            ]),\n        });\n\n        // Shard 1: 100x normal (severely skewed)\n        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n            total_docs: 100_000,\n            avg_doc_length: 55.0,\n            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 10_000 }),\n                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 8_000 }),\n            ]),\n        });\n\n        // Shard 2: Near-empty\n        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n            total_docs: 10,\n            avg_doc_length: 45.0,\n            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 1 }),\n                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 1 }),\n            ]),\n        });\n\n        // Execute preflight to get global IDF\n        let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n            terms: vec![\"machine\".into(), \"learning\".into()],\n            filter: None,\n        };\n\n        let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, &c, &preflight_req, &topo).await.unwrap();\n\n        // Verify global aggregation\n        assert_eq!(global_idf.total_docs, 101_010);\n        assert_eq!(global_idf.terms.get(\"machine\").unwrap().df, 10_101);\n        assert_eq!(global_idf.terms.get(\"learning\").unwrap().df, 8_081);\n\n        // Verify global IDF is the same for all shards\n        // Expected IDF for \"machine\": log((101010 - 10101 + 0.5) / (10101 + 0.5)) + 1\n        let expected_idf_machine: f64 = ((101010.0_f64 - 10101.0 + 0.5) / (10101.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n        let actual_idf_machine = global_idf.terms.get(\"machine\").unwrap().idf;\n        assert!((actual_idf_machine - expected_idf_machine).abs() < 0.001);\n\n        // Expected IDF for \"learning\": log((101010 - 8081 + 0.5) / (8081 + 0.5)) + 1\n        let expected_idf_learning: f64 = ((101010.0_f64 - 8081.0 + 0.5) / (8081.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n        let actual_idf_learning = global_idf.terms.get(\"learning\").unwrap().idf;\n        assert!((actual_idf_learning - expected_idf_learning).abs() < 0.001);\n\n        // Verify that without global IDF, local IDF values would differ significantly\n        // Shard 0 local IDF for \"machine\": log((1000 - 100 + 0.5) / (100 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 3.19\n        // Shard 1 local IDF for \"machine\": log((100000 - 10000 + 0.5) / (10000 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 3.20\n        // Shard 2 local IDF for \"machine\": log((10 - 1 + 0.5) / (1 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.85\n        let local_idf_shard_0: f64 = ((1000.0_f64 - 100.0 + 0.5) / (100.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n        let local_idf_shard_2: f64 = ((10.0_f64 - 1.0 + 0.5) / (1.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n        assert!((local_idf_shard_2 - local_idf_shard_0).abs() > 0.2, \"Local IDF values should differ significantly\");\n        assert!((local_idf_shard_2 - actual_idf_machine).abs() > 0.3, \"Global IDF should be closer to large-shard local IDF\");\n    }\n\n    /// Test that DFS preflight handles empty query terms gracefully.\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_dfs_empty_query_terms() {\n        let topo = make_test_topology();\n        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64, c.errors.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-g1-0\".into()), NodeError::Timeout);\n\n        let req = make_req();\n\n        // With fallback policy, shards should succeed via group 1\n        let result =
